title: ForgeConfig
description: Schema for .forge/config.json — the per-project Forge configuration file. Canonical single-source schema (FORGE-S25-T12 reconciled sdlc-config.schema.json into this file and deleted the sibling). Generated by /forge:init and refreshed by /forge:update.

version.description: Config schema version (e.g. '1.0'). Used for migration support.

prefix.description: Short prefix for task/sprint/bug IDs (e.g. ACME)

stack.description: Detected/declared project technology stack. Optional fields nullable because not every project ships e.g. a frontend or task queue.

taskQueue.description: Task queue if detected (celery, sidekiq, etc.)

commands.description: Resolved project tooling commands. Workflows reference these via {COMMAND_TEST} / {LINT_COMMAND} placeholders.

customCommands.description: Directory for project-specific custom pipeline phase commands. Files here are workflow scripts invoked directly by the orchestrator via the phase workflow field.

forgeRef.description: Pinned Forge plugin reference (tag or commit) the project was generated against. Used to resolve the plugin root via cache lookup.

pipeline.description: Optional pipeline customisation for the default pipeline

includeTokenDataInBugReports.description: If set, silently opt in (true) or out (false) of appending sprint token usage data to Forge bug reports. When absent, the user is prompted at report time.

pipelines.description: Named pipeline definitions. Each key is a pipeline name that tasks can reference via their `pipeline` field. The `default` pipeline is used when a task has no `pipeline` field. Projects define custom pipelines to route tasks to specialized agent commands.

description.description: Human-readable description of when to use this pipeline

phases.description: Ordered list of pipeline phases. Each phase maps to a slash command.

command.description: Slash command name (without /) to invoke for this phase

role.description: Semantic role of this phase in the pipeline lifecycle

model.description: Optional model override for this phase

maxIterations.description: Max revision loop iterations for review phases

on_revision.description: Command name of the phase to re-invoke on 'Revision Required'. Defaults to the nearest preceding non-review phase if omitted.

workflow.description: Optional path to a workflow file. When set, the orchestrator reads and follows this file directly instead of deriving the workflow from the command name. Use for custom phase commands in engineering/commands/.

installedSkills.description: Marketplace skill names installed during forge:init or recommended by forge:health. Used to wire skill invocations into generated personas and workflows.

calibrationBaseline.description: Calibration baseline written by /forge:init after skill generation. Records the state at calibration time so /forge:calibrate can detect drift.

lastCalibrated.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the last calibration run

version.description: Plugin version string at calibration time (e.g. 0.9.3)

masterIndexHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the semantic content of engineering/MASTER_INDEX.md at calibration time

sprintsCovered.description: Sprint IDs whose tasks and outcomes were included in the calibration baseline

calibrationHistory.description: Audit trail of calibration runs. Each entry records the drift categories detected and the patches applied.

date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of this calibration run

categories.description: Drift categories detected: technical, business, retrospective, acceptance-criteria

applied.description: Whether this patch was applied (true if approved and succeeded, false if skipped or failed)
